pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: projects.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: Meu Portfólio
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  css:
    - styles.css
  toc: true
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  theme: cosmo
  title: Projetos
  subtitle: Modelagem Macroeconômica e Financeira
  listing:
    contents: posts
    sort: date desc
    type: default
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  page-layout: full
  title-block-banner: true
